+    if model3 is not None:

+        all_aug_preds3 = []

+        for shift in shifts:

+            test_shifted = np.roll(test_norm, shift, axis=-1)

+            preds_shifted = predict_single(model3, test_shifted, residual3, device)

+            preds_unshifted = np.roll(preds_shifted, -shift, axis=-1)

+            all_aug_preds3.append(preds_unshifted)

+        preds3 = np.mean(all_aug_preds3, axis=0)

+        all_preds_list.append(preds3)

+

+    # Average all model predictions

+    preds_norm = np.mean(all_preds_list, axis=0)

+

+    # Denormalize predictions

+    predictions = np.zeros_like(preds_norm)

+    predictions[:, 0] = preds_norm[:, 0] * z_std + z_mean
